title: NORD Patient-Avatar-3D-Club
text: NORD Patient-Avatar-3D-Club S; 1 SWS; The NORD Patient-Avatar-3D-Club is a regular seminar event as an integral part of the NORD Patient-Avatar-3D-Network. The aim is the regular exchange between the research locations Kiel, L�beck and Hamburg with a focus on complex in vitro, in vivo and ex vivo models for precision medicine approaches in oncology. In addition to various model systems such as spheroids, organoids, tissue slices, leukemic co-culture models and animal models, methodological content is also taught/emphasized, including bioprinting, read-out procedures, imaging, automated microscopy, flow cytometry, OMICs technology, etc. (NORD = Northern Oncology Research & Development); jeden Monat am 4. Mi, 17:15 - 19:15, Online-Veranstaltung; Zeit und Ort: Mi, 17:15 - 19:15, einmal pro Monat, Hybrid-Veranstaltung Bemerkung zu Zeit und Ort: Das Seminar findet hybrid statt � QFZ R.10.1 und Zoom. Daten, Seminarlisten und ZOOM-Link werden �ber den UCCSH-Verteiler, KON-Verteiler und den Patient-Avatar-Verteiler verschickt. Registrierung bitte �ber nina.hedemann@uksh.de Medicine S
